category_title: Sixth-grade students with diverse learning and emotional disorders
scenario_title: Standard reading task with disruptive and unfocused behaviors
minimal_context: The student is asked to read a story from the required curriculum book in their sixth-grade English class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your book and start reading the story from our required curriculum.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't have any supplies for the first day of school. Besides, this is boring and I'm worried that I won't be able to focus on reading a book.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is a borrowed pencil. Please just try your best to read.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Puts head on the desk) I can't do it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please sit up and keep trying to read the story.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Falls out of their seat, then gets up to sharpen the borrowed pencil for the fourth time in 10 minutes, 'accidentally' hitting another student on the way)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open your book and start reading the story from our required curriculum.

STUDENT: I don't have any supplies for the first day of school. Besides, this is boring and I'm worried that I won't be able to focus on reading a book.

TUTOR: Here is a borrowed pencil. Please just try your best to read.

STUDENT: (Puts head on the desk) I can't do it.

TUTOR: Please sit up and keep trying to read the story.

STUDENT: (Falls out of their seat, then gets up to sharpen the borrowed pencil for the fourth time in 10 minutes, 'accidentally' hitting another student on the way)

task.content: reading a book and taking a story from the required curriculum

context.materials: book, borrowed pencil, required curriculum story, script
context.time_context: first day of school / prior to the action research

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: prior to the action research when asked to read
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: head on the desk, falling out of their seat, no supplies for the first day of school, ‘accidentally’ hitting someone as they leave their seat for the fourth time in 10 minutes to sharpen the pencil they borrowed
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: found it boring and worried that she would not be able to focus on reading a book

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: disruptive in class, struggles with motivation, self-control, and organization
